channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Quezon Wins Multiple Awards at 9th Eddys
item.description: The film 'Quezon' emerged as a major winner at the 9th Eddys, claiming several prestigious awards including Best Picture, Best Director, and Best Actor. The ceremony, held on July 6, 2026, celebrated ...

item.title: Teacher and Carpenter Acquitted in Murder Case
item.description: Two Tanzanian professionals, a teacher and a carpenter, were acquitted in a high-profile murder case after the court found insufficient evidence to support the prosecution's claims. The case, which ga...

item.title: Mallory McMorrow exits Michigan Democratic Senate primary, narrowing race between Stevens and El-Sayed
item.description: Michigan State Senator Mallory McMorrow has withdrawn from the Democratic primary race for the U.S. Senate seat in Michigan, significantly reshaping the contest ahead of the general election campaign ...

item.title: Wallabies' Ryan Lonergan undergoes scans after injury in Ireland clash
item.description: Ryan Lonergan, the Brumbies' scrumhalf, underwent precautionary throat scans following a 33-31 loss to Ireland, despite delivering a standout performance in his first start for the Wallabies. The 28-y...

item.title: PDP Faction Calls for Investigation into Gbajabiamila Over Fake Agency Allegations
item.description: The article discusses a political scandal involving the PDP faction's demand for the ouster of Chief of Staff to the President, Adeyemi Gbajabiamila, over allegations of a fake government agency. The ...

item.title: Simba Sports Club Celebrates Historic Cup Victory with Massive Parade
item.description: Thousands of Simba Sports Club supporters transformed Dar es Salaam into a sea of red and white as they celebrated their team's CRDB Federation Cup victory with a massive parade. The celebration follo...

item.title: Ayesha Bajeta shares behind-the-scenes photos with the cast of “The Alibi”
item.description: The article highlights a collection of behind-the-scenes photos shared by Ayesha Bajeta during the production of the television series “The Alibi.” Based on the available information, the feature focu...

item.title: Tonia Mishiali Explores Immigration, Patriarchy, and Female Resilience in ‘The Lion at My Back’
item.description: Cypriot filmmaker Tonia Mishiali’s second feature film, “The Lion at My Back,” is featured in the Crystal Globe competition at the Karlovy Vary Film Festival and centers on intersecting stories of imm...

item.title: Millions in Jewelry Stolen from French Glassmaker Museum
item.description: A high-value theft occurred at a museum belonging to a French glassmaker, where millions of dollars worth of jewelry were stolen. The incident, reported on July 5, 2026, has led to the charging of two...

item.title: SEEPCO and Delta State Launch Blood Donation Drive to Boost Blood Supply
item.description: Sterling Oil Exploration and Energy Production Company (SEEPCO) partnered with Delta State Government, Vcare for Development Foundation (VCDF), and Nigerian Red Cross Society to promote voluntary bloo...

item.title: OPEC+ Nations Modestly Increase Oil Output Amid Price Decline
item.description: Seven OPEC+ nations have agreed to moderately increase their monthly oil production as global prices continue to decline. This decision comes amid concerns about market stability and the need to balan...

item.title: Lawyer and Human Rights Group Say Detained Gaza Doctor Hussam Abu Safiya Shows Signs of Severe Abuse and Declining Health
item.description: A lawyer representing Palestinian doctor Hussam Abu Safiya says his client is in critical condition after approximately 18 months in Israeli detention. Abu Safiya, the former director of Kamal Adwan H...

item.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Meets with Hamas and Hezbollah During Ali Khamenei's Funeral
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi met with representatives of Hamas, Hezbollah, and other regional allies during the funeral of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, according to state media. The multi-d...

item.title: Trump's Alleged Influence on FIFA World Cup Decision Sparks Controversy
item.description: President Donald Trump reportedly intervened in the FIFA World Cup to reinstate U.S. soccer player Folarin Balogun, who had been suspended after receiving a red card. The decision by FIFA to overturn ...

item.title: Brazil coach Ancelotti rejects 'anti-Haaland' strategy ahead of World Cup clash with Norway
item.description: Brazil's coach Carlo Ancelotti has dismissed suggestions of a specific 'anti-Haaland plan' for their World Cup Round of 16 match against Norway, emphasizing trust in the team's collective defensive st...

item.title: Farage and Cottrell: Controversy Over Unreported Benefits and Legal Past
item.description: The article details the controversy surrounding Nigel Farage, leader of Reform UK, and his alleged failure to declare benefits received from George Cottrell, a convicted criminal and aristocrat. Cottr...

item.title: Protests and Clashes in AJK Amid JAAC Demands
item.description: Clashes erupted in Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) as the proscribed Joint Awami Action Committee (JAAC) organized demonstrations across the region. In Mirpur district, protests led to injuries among pro...

item.title: Shakira and FIFA commit $500,000 to Venezuela earthquake relief and education support
item.description: Shakira has pledged $500,000 from the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund to support education intervention for children affected by the devastating earthquakes in northern Venezuela on June 24, 2026. ...

item.title: Tanzania and China Strengthen Business Collaboration
item.description: The Tanzanian government has introduced guidelines to ensure safer business practices with China, emphasizing regulatory compliance and due diligence as trade between the two nations grows. With Chine...

item.title: Journalist Accuses Bank MD of Romantic Affair, Faces Arrest and Detention
item.description: Nura Distin, a journalist, accused Sheriff Almuhajir, the Managing Director of Yobe Microfinance Bank, of having a romantic affair with his wife, leading to his arrest and detention. Distin claimed Al...
